整部zhěng bùHSK 6the whole (film)
整天zhěngtiānHSK 6all day long
之上zhī shàngHSK 6above
之中zhī zhōngHSK 6within
之处zhīchùHSK 6the point where (literary)
支点zhīdiǎnHSK 6fulcrum; pivot
之后zhīhòuHSK 6after
知识zhīshiHSK 6knowledge
之外zhīwàiHSK 6outside of
知足zhīzúHSK 6to be content
终点zhōngdiǎnHSK 6finish line
中国画ZhōngguóhuàHSK 6Chinese painting
终将zhōngjiāngHSK 6will eventually
终极zhōngjíHSK 6ultimate
中立zhōnglìHSK 6neutral; neutrality
忠实zhōngshíHSK 6faithful
中小zhōngxiǎoHSK 6small and medium-sized
中庸zhōngyōngHSK 6the Mean; the middle way
掌握zhǎngwòHSK 6to master
展示zhǎnshìHSK 6to display; present
指的是zhǐ de shìHSK 6refers to
指教zhǐjiàoHSK 6to give guidance (polite)
指尖zhǐjiānHSK 6fingertip
煮不熟zhǔ bu shúHSK 6cannot cook through
主人zhǔrénHSK 6host
最少zuì shǎoHSK 6fewest
最大zuìdàHSK 6biggest
最佳zuìjiāHSK 6the best (formal)
最终zuìzhōngHSK 6finally
做出zuòchūHSK 6to make (a decision)
做得zuòdeHSK 6to do (with complement)
做法zuòfǎHSK 6approach; practice
作家zuòjiāHSK 6writer
作品zuòpǐnHSK 6work (of art)
做事zuòshìHSK 6to do things
作者zuòzhěHSK 6author
琢磨zuómoHSK 6to ponder over
嘴里zuǐlǐHSK 6in the mouth
左右zuǒyòuHSK 6to sway; control
在我看来zài wǒ kànláiHSK 6in my view
再创作zàichuàngzuòHSK 6re-creation
再说zàishuōHSK 6to see later; put off
载体zàitǐHSK 6vehicle; carrier
赞成zànchéngHSK 6to approve of
赞美zànměiHSK 6praise; compliment
造桥zào qiáoHSK 6to build bridges
造福zàofúHSK 6to benefit; bring good to
噪音zàoyīnHSK 6noise
凿石záo shíHSK 6to chisel rock
责任感zérèngǎnHSK 6sense of responsibility
自不量力zì bú liàng lìHSK 6to overestimate one's strength
自上而下zì shàng ér xiàHSK 6from top to bottom
自如zìrúHSK 6with ease; freely
自身zìshēnHSK 6its own (formal)
自主zìzhǔHSK 6autonomous; self-directed
增高zēnggāoHSK 6to grow taller
增长zēngzhǎngHSK 6to grow; to increase
资本zīběnHSK 6capital
遵循zūnxúnHSK 6to follow; to abide by
尊严zūnyánHSK 6dignity
早已zǎoyǐHSK 6long since
子孙zǐsūnHSK 6children and grandchildren
子子孙孙zǐzǐ-sūnsūnHSK 6generation after generation
走了zǒuleHSK 6to have gone (euphemism for died)
走向zǒuxiàngHSK 6direction; course
按键ànjiànHSK 6button; key
奥运会ÀoyùnhuìHSK 6Olympic Games
挨打áidǎHSK 6to take hits
熬成áochéngHSK 6to simmer into
二字èr zìHSK 6these two characters
而言éryánHSK 6as far as (someone) is concerned
儿子érziHSK 6son
安慰ānwèiHSK 6to console
